feedback.markdownBody:
# Review CHANGES REQUESTED for PAN-1994

Active replanning still gets stale mergeStatus=merged before the guard

## Required action

Fix every blocking review finding, commit the fixes, then re-request review with:

`pan review request PAN-1994 -m "Fixed review issues"`

## REQUIRED: Fix the failing check, push, and request a new review

1. Read the error output above carefully
2. Fix the code causing the failure
3. Run the failing check locally to verify it passes
4. Commit every change
5. Invoke the /rebase-and-submit skill for PAN-1994 Рђћ this is an atomic task. Because verification already ran once (a PR exists), the skill will push your branch and run `pan review request PAN-1994 -m "Fixed test"` for you. NEVER curl `/api/review/...` or any dashboard endpoint Рђћ `pan review request` is the only supported re-entry point.

Do NOT stop between steps. Do NOT stop after pushing. Do NOT stop until `pan review request` has completed successfully.
